metadata.title: Scivra — Interactive Science Labs in 3D
metadata.description: Explore interactive 3D science labs for Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Earth Science, and Math. Aligned with NGSS, GCSE, and AP standards.
metadata.keywords: scivra, interactive science labs, 3d science labs, physics simulations, chemistry labs, biology labs, earth science, math visualizations, ngss, gcse, ap
